ats_utilities.checker.reporter.checker_reporter_registry module¶

checker_reporter_registry.py

Info

Encapsulates core runtime components for simplification of CheckerReporterBundle creation.

class ats_utilities.checker.reporter.checker_reporter_registry.CheckerReporterRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Encapsulates core runtime components for simplification of CheckerReporterBundle creation.

It defines:

methods:
create_checker_reporter_bundle - Creates a CheckerReporterBundle.
classmethod create_checker_reporter_bundle(context: str, parameters_meta: Sequence[ParamMetadata], err_indices: Sequence[int], is_fmt_err: bool) → CheckerReporterBundle[source]¶

Creates a CheckerReporterBundle.

Parameters:

  • context (<str>) – Message context.

  • parameters_meta (<Sequence[ParamMetadata]>) – Sequence of parameter name and parameter type tuples.

  • err_indices (<Sequence[int]>) – Sequence of error indices.

  • is_fmt_err (<bool>) – Flag indicating if format error type has been found.

Returns:

CheckerReporterBundle instance.

Return type:

<CheckerReporterBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSTypeError: Context must be a string.
ATSTypeError: Parameters metadata must be a sequence of ParamMetadata.
ATSTypeError: Error indices must be a sequence of integers.
ATSTypeError: Is format error must be a boolean.
